item.description:
Betfair reposteó Betfair Exchange @BetfairExchange · 2min 50 goals for Harry Kane so far this season.
He’s scored over 40, four times.
He’s scored over 30, eight times.
He's currently 3.15 to win the Ballon d'Or 1 1 3 237

item.title: RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 16min Former stable lad disqualified from horseracing for 32 months for serious sexual miscond
item.description: Racing Post @RacingPost · 16min Former stable lad disqualified from horseracing for 32 months for serious sexual misconduct and abusing his position De racingpost.com 4 1 2 mil

item.title:
Betfair: Betfair @Betfair · 17min Haven't Sheffield Wednesday been punished enough?
The EFL has informed the preferred bidder of
item.description:
Betfair @Betfair · 17min Haven't Sheffield Wednesday been punished enough?
The EFL has informed the preferred bidder of the club that they will start next season in League One with a 15-point penalty. 2 1 mil

item.title:

He couldn't bring
item.description:
William Hill @WilliamHill · 18min Harry Kane doing Harry Kane things just before the 2026 World Cup.
He couldn't bring it home... Could he? 2 1 mil
